cards.title: Startup, Resume, and Recovery Shell

fields.Current note: Refined in `1f62d11` after operator feedback. Actual app smoke pass: first screen now shows Open Existing Job, Start New Job, and recovery only when interrupted state exists; Existing Job routes through a picker into Setup Mode; New Job now includes save folder and PTGui template selection. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Operator visual signoff on revised startup/new-job flow, then verify archive/ignore recovery once a real crash state is present.

cards.title: 9-Grid and Live Stitch Mapping Verification

Job/manifest now persist the template mapping override state.
fields.Next action: Operator/hardware review on the live array, then add the advanced override editing flow if a nonstandard PTGui template is encountered.

cards.title: ROI Profiles and Required Overlay Verification Roll

fields.Current note: Initial shell landed in `ae1bc2e`; close-loop landed in `9cefa66`. Overlay/QC now has context-keyed ROI fallback, fast/full verification actions, VisualAnalyzer ROI injection, repo-local DB resolution, 9/9 REC observation, majority roll/clip advance observation, and pass-state persistence. `swift build` passed; app smoke pass verified startup through Overlay/QC on existing footage.
fields.Next action: Live-array verification: confirm Fast Test passes after a forced roll/clip advance, Full Test requires stop after REC, and stale/missing ROI stays yellow/non-blocking.

cards.title: Working Mode 500 ms REC Consensus Engine

fields.Current note: Implemented in `feee6fa` after the 500 ms tolerance change in `9cefa66`; SDI dropout grace landed in `e6a5ca0`; direct full-consensus start landed in `cf0c6e8`. Full 9/9 REC consensus now starts recording from the per-camera consensus path, while partial REC states that persist past 500 ms start recording before posting per-camera CAMERA_FAILED_TO_RECORD or CAMERA_RECORDED_ALONE events. Missing SDI signal is handled separately with a 1s debounce and does not stop recording or create loud alarm spam. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Live-array verification across 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, 5/4 split, and bump/dropout patterns; confirm event log, sidecar flags, Operator Console REC state, and folder sorting remain coherent.

cards.summary: Implemented in `feee6fa` after the 500 ms tolerance change in `9cefa66`; SDI dropout grace landed in `e6a5ca0`; direct full-consensus start landed in `cf0c6e8`. Full 9/9 REC consensus now starts recording from the per-camera consensus path, while partial REC states that persist past 500 ms start recording before posting per-camera CAMERA_FAILED_TO_RECORD or CAMERA_RECORDED_ALONE events. Missing SDI signal is handled separately with a 1s debounce and does not stop recording or create loud alarm spam. `swift build` passed. Live-array verification across 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, 5/4 split, and bump/dropout patterns; confirm event log, sidecar flags, Operator Console REC state, and folder sorting remain coherent.

cards.title: Authoritative Roll/Clip OCR Take Identity

fields.Current note: Slices landed in `fca62f6`, `c5fff9e`, and `984b1a6`: Overlay/QC has a Clip Sync report action, unreadable/mismatched OCR is logged as non-loud `CLIP_MISMATCH`, clip-sync readiness persists into Overlay/QC rows, and production take renaming now requires at least 5 matching stable OCR cameras. If consensus fails, the take keeps its interim folder and gets a sidecar QC flag.
fields.Next action: Hardware/OCR validation with real overlays: prove OCR reaches 5/9+ reliably, tune ROI/Vision settings if needed, and then carry clip-sync status into daily reports.

cards.summary: Slices landed in `fca62f6`, `c5fff9e`, and `984b1a6`: Overlay/QC has a Clip Sync report action, unreadable/mismatched OCR is logged as non-loud `CLIP_MISMATCH`, clip-sync readiness persists into Overlay/QC rows, and production take renaming now requires at least 5 matching stable OCR cameras. If consensus fails, the take keeps its interim folder and gets a sidecar QC flag. Hardware/OCR validation with real overlays: prove OCR reaches 5/9+ reliably, tune ROI/Vision settings if needed, and then carry clip-sync status into daily reports.

cards.title: Take Sorting, Sidecar, and Manifest Finalization

fields.Current note: Core lifecycle routing landed in `6d8340a`; operator review override landed in `937e427`; short-take review landed in `02364ef`. Closed takes now get explicit `takeClassification` and `classificationReason`; critical REC consensus flags route to `qc_fail/`; false-roll flags route to `false_roll/`; warning-only issues such as SDI dropout remain in `takes/` with QC metadata. Sidecar filenames follow the final folder name, clip-level QC flags are populated, manifest rollup scans all sort folders, QC-fail/false-roll takes create a non-blocking Operator Console review item, and good takes under the 5s short-take threshold queue review with Keep Good, Slate/VFX Chart, False Roll, and QC Fail choices. Slate/VFX Chart stays in `takes/` and adds `SLATE_OR_VFX_CHART` metadata. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: App/hardware validation: record normal, short slate/chart, accidental short false roll, 8/9, 1/9, middle partial, late-stop, and manual false-roll patterns; inspect folder placement, per-take `data.json`, `manifest.json`, and Review Take override behavior.

cards.summary: Core lifecycle routing landed in `6d8340a`; operator review override landed in `937e427`; short-take review landed in `02364ef`. Closed takes now get explicit `takeClassification` and `classificationReason`; critical REC consensus flags route to `qc_fail/`; false-roll flags route to `false_roll/`; warning-only issues such as SDI dropout remain in `takes/` with QC metadata. Sidecar filenames follow the final folder name, clip-level QC flags are populated, manifest rollup scans all sort folders, QC-fail/false-roll takes create a non-blocking Operator Console review item, and good takes under the 5s short-take threshold queue review with Keep Good, Slate/VFX Chart, False Roll, and QC Fail choices. Slate/VFX Chart stays in `takes/` and adds `SLATE_OR_VFX_CHART` metadata. `swift build` passed. App/hardware validation: record normal, short slate/chart, accidental short false roll, 8/9, 1/9, middle partial, late-stop, and manual false-roll patterns; inspect folder placement, per-take `data.json`, `manifest.json`, and Review Take override behavior.

cards.title: Late Stop and False Roll Operator Flows

fields.Current note: Initial alarm model landed in `cebfcdd`. Critical REC/sync/genlock alarms are sticky, drive grid-cell visuals plus the Operator Console REC-pill alarm text, and trigger beep + AVFoundation TTS. Warning-only metadata such as clip mismatch and SDI dropout stays quiet/log-only. Operator Console now has a Silence Audio action that stops current TTS without clearing visual state. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Operator/audio review: verify alarm wording, sound level, silence behavior, and whether additional alarm classes should be loud or visual-only.

cards.title: 9-Grid Recording and Alarm Overlays

fields.Current note: Protected fallback landed in `16340d6`; live recorder telemetry landed in `915cd82`. The 9-grid writer starts first and is the required protected recorder. Live Stitch writer start failure no longer kills the take. During active production takes, writers now track submitted/appended/dropped/failure counters; sustained 9-grid stalls emit loud `PROTECTED_RECORDER_STALLED`, while Live Stitch/per-camera stalls and dropped frames emit warning metadata. Production sidecars include structured `recordingOutputs` with writer health fields and `protectedFallbackAvailable`. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Fault-inject Live Stitch/9-grid writer failures and heavy writer backpressure to verify alarms, sidecar fields, and 9-grid protection behavior.

cards.summary: Protected fallback landed in `16340d6`; live recorder telemetry landed in `915cd82`. The 9-grid writer starts first and is the required protected recorder. Live Stitch writer start failure no longer kills the take. During active production takes, writers now track submitted/appended/dropped/failure counters; sustained 9-grid stalls emit loud `PROTECTED_RECORDER_STALLED`, while Live Stitch/per-camera stalls and dropped frames emit warning metadata. Production sidecars include structured `recordingOutputs` with writer health fields and `protectedFallbackAvailable`. `swift build` passed. Fault-inject Live Stitch/9-grid writer failures and heavy writer backpressure to verify alarms, sidecar fields, and 9-grid protection behavior.

cards.title: Independent Recorder Health and Protected 9-Grid Fallback

fields.Current note: Initial late-stop/false-roll slice landed in `6a65e14`. Sustained stop-side partial REC after a full-array take now emits loud `CAMERA_STOPPED_LATE` warnings, records final late-stop offsets when the late camera stops, and keeps warning-only late stops in `takes/`. Operator Console now has a Mark False Roll action that moves the latest closed take to `false_roll/`, updates its sidecar/manifest, and logs `FALSE_ROLL_DETECTED`. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Hardware/OCR validation: roll a clean 9/9 take, force one camera to stop late, confirm warning/TTS/clear behavior and sidecar offset. Then mark a closed take false roll and verify folder move plus manifest update.

cards.summary: Initial late-stop/false-roll slice landed in `6a65e14`. Operator Console now has a Mark False Roll action that moves the latest closed take to `false_roll/`, updates its sidecar/manifest, and logs `FALSE_ROLL_DETECTED`. `swift build` passed. cards.title: Minimal Timecode Status Plumbing

fields.Current note: Minimal TC status service landed in `c016972`. The router now tracks the best observed timing source, and per-take sidecars store start/end `TimecodeStatus` with source, confidence, certified/degraded flags, primary slot/camera, display TC, frame count, and detail. Current AVFoundation/file-playback paths are explicitly degraded/approximate until RP188 providers land. Operator Console Timecode readiness copy now reflects non-certified/degraded modes. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Validate sidecar output on a short playback take; later cards still need DeckLink/RP188 capture, failover, and embedded QuickTime `tmcd`.

cards.summary: Minimal TC status service landed in `c016972`. fields.Current note: Implemented in `75d82cb`. The Operator Console project summary now has an Open Record Folder action that ensures the project layout exists and opens the current project root containing `takes/`, `qc_fail/`, and `false_roll/`. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: App smoke verification: click the action in Working Mode and confirm Finder opens the active project folder.

cards.summary: Implemented in `75d82cb`. App smoke verification: click the action in Working Mode and confirm Finder opens the active project folder.

cards.title: Live Stitch Program Overlay System

fields.Current note: Initial preset slice landed in `de55659`. Live Stitch now has a default Production Review program overlay drawn in the Metal pass, so TC/roll-clip/slate placeholder text is intentionally recordable when enabled. TC turns red while recording, the Live Stitch red border remains live-only, and Operator Console exposes quick Overlay Review / Overlay Clean buttons. Clean disables the recordable overlay. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Operator visual review: confirm lower-band layout, TC/roll-clip legibility, red TC during REC, clean mode behavior, and whether placeholder slate fields should wait for card 21 controls before production use.

cards.summary: Initial preset slice landed in `de55659`. TC turns red while recording, the Live Stitch red border remains live-only, and Operator Console exposes quick Overlay Review / Overlay Clean buttons. Clean disables the recordable overlay. `swift build` passed. Operator visual review: confirm lower-band layout, TC/roll-clip legibility, red TC during REC, clean mode behavior, and whether placeholder slate fields should wait for card 21 controls before production use.

cards.title: Slate Service and Operator Console Slate Controls

fields.Current note: Overlay controls landed in `cdb66c5`, durable REC-start snapshots in `e89f86f`, and take-advance/edit controls in `57bc1cd`. The Slate tab exposes Scene, Take, and DIR/DP fields, persists current slate state in `_STATE/current_slate.json`, feeds applied values into the Live Stitch overlay, snapshots non-empty slate values into production take sidecars/manifest at REC start, advances numeric take labels after good production takes, and can rewrite the latest take slate after recording. False-roll marking now preserves slate while flagging slate quality as `false_roll`. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: App smoke verification: apply slate values, record a short production take, confirm overlay text, take auto-advance, per-take `slate` JSON, Update Last Take Slate, and false-roll slate quality. Remaining build work: daily report formatting.

suggested_next_pulls: Do not pick up `HITL`, `blocked`, or `needs-verification` issues unless explicitly assigned by Andrew/Drew.
When implementation lands, remove `Sandcastle` and add `needs-verification` if operator/hardware/app review is still required.
Close issues only after the acceptance criteria are actually satisfied.
acceptance_gates: Setup Mode and Working Mode are explicit and visually distinct.
Default PTGui template loads for every job and active template is recorded.
Mapping and ROI/overlay verification are usable in Setup Mode.
REC consensus uses 500 ms and classifies 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, and middle partial patterns.
Roll/clip OCR drives production take identity.
Take sidecars and manifest update after every closed Working Mode take.
9-grid and Live Stitch recording health are visible and independent.
Degraded/non-certified TC status is visible and persisted.
